ab: Ngaayay kako micaliw kisonan to payci han?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ngaayay to , hakowa ko cacaliwen iso a payci?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Matawalay ako a miala to payci, ngaayay a micaliw kako kisonan to payci han?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Awaay ko payci ako.
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: Matawalay ako a miala to payci, ngaayay a micaliw kako kisonan to payci han?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Naay, ya nicaliwan iso i nacila a payci cowa ho kapatikolen iso kako.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Ngaayay micaliw kako to riko’ no miso han?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Ngaayay to, ala han niso.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Ngaayay micaliw kako to tilid no miso han?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Pacaliwan to no mako ci Hokin.
en: B: I lent it to Hokin.

ab: Pacaliwen ho kako to tingsiya iso?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Hayda, kawrira i patikolen kako anocila.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Maoraday to, cowa kapiala kako to dinay, Pacaliwen ho kako to dinay iso?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Cecayay ko dinay ako, malacafay kita ci dinay
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: Yanicaliwan ako i naci:la a tilid, patikolen ako kiso.
ch: A:這是我上次借你的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: O manan ho ko nanengnengan iso a tilid, pasowal han to kako.
ch: B:你還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Hacowa a patikolen ako kiso to payci?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Ngaay to, ira to ko payci iso itiya sa to a mipatikol.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It’s okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Hacowa a patikol kiso i takowanan to payci?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Patikolen ako kiso anocila.
en: A: I’ll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Hacowa a patikol kiso i takowanan to tilid?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Mapatikolay to ako kiso i nacila kiya?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Pacaliwan ni Hokin kiso tona impic haw?
en: A: Did Hokin lend you this pen?

ab: Hayi, nicaliwan ako anini cingra.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: nicaliwan iso ci Hokin tona impic haw?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Hokin?

ab: Cowa, o no ina niacaan
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Awaay to ko cinah, caliwen ho ko cinah ni Miding.
en: A: We’re out of salt, let’s go borrow some from Miding.

ab: Hai, micaliw kako.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: Papipatikolen ci Miding to payci ako.
en: B: Go tell Miding to give me back my money.

ab: pina ko nicaliwan ningra a payci?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
